dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pattern detection: (1) Downtrend confirmed by close below sma_20; (2) First candle is black (body < 0); (3) Second candle is white (open > prev_close AND close > prev_close); (4) Entry assumes second candle opens and closes above midpoint of first candle body via price strength indicators. Exit on reversal (close below previous close). Pattern ranked 31/103 overall; conservative 2% stop-loss and 5-day hold applied given moderate success rate.

Exit on reversal (close below previous close). Pattern ranked 31/103 overall; conservative 2% stop-loss and 5-day hold applied given moderate success rate.

source_rule_text: Above the Stomach: A bullish reversal candlestick pattern appearing in a downtrend, beginning with a black candle followed by a white candle where price opens above the middle of the black candle's body and closes above the middle, indicating bulls have wrested control with no ground ceded to bears.
